temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A woman with dark hair, wearing a blue robe over a patterned shirt, screams in terror. Her face is smeared with blood around her mouth and chin. She is wedged in a doorway, holding a small knife in one hand, and repeatedly stabs at a large, grey, rusty axe that is violently swinging back and forth in front of her face. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a high-stakes, terrifying situation, showing the character in a life-or-death struggle against an unseen assailant.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Terrified, panicked screaming. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, metallic clangs of the axe hitting the doorframe, accompanied by a tense, percussive musical score.)
(00:04-00:07) The woman's screams intensify as the axe continues to swing wildly, narrowly missing her face. Her eyes are wide with pure horror as she flinches and recoils with each near-miss, her mouth agape in terror. (Storyline: The tension escalates as the immediate threat becomes more precise and deadly, focusing on the woman's escalating fear.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: High-pitched, terrified screaming. 2) Background sounds or music: The loud, metallic clangs of the axe hitting the doorframe continue, synchronized with the woman's screams.)
